tasks.title: Split proxy_pool.go into smaller components
evidence: wc -l internal/fetch/proxy_pool.go reports 720 LOC (>700 file-size limit).
plan: Extract proxy pool configuration, health checks, and selection logic into separate files.
Preserve public types and behavior.
Update tests and run go test ./internal/fetch.

tasks.title: Split graphql/resolvers.go to meet size guidelines

plan: Group resolvers by domain into separate files.
Keep resolver interfaces and registration unchanged.
Update tests or add new ones as needed.
Run go test ./internal/api.

tasks.title: Add top-of-file docstrings in apperrors package files
evidence: internal/apperrors/apperrors.go starts with `package apperrors` and places the doc comment below it.
internal/apperrors/sanitize.go and internal/apperrors/sentinels.go follow the same pattern; tests in apperrors also begin without top-of-file docstrings.
plan: Move or add docstrings before the package statement in the apperrors files.
Ensure each docstring states responsibilities, non-goals, and invariants/assumptions.
Run gofmt and confirm tests still pass.
